description: Prospective randomized-audit assignment-contract manifest. Generated + hashed BEFORE recording. B9 refuses any executed dataset that does not adhere to a valid contract (development-only, NO scientific claim).

generated_before_recording.note: HARD STOP if false -- the table must predate the data/labels

seed.note: RNG seed that produced the assignment table (pins reproducibility)

design_class_Y.must_not_be: an observed or generated post-hoc label Y

balance.rule: within each subject x microblock, the C x Y_design cell counts are EQUAL (or a predeclared count)

tolerance.note: exact by construction for the recommended quadruplet microblock

microblock.recommended: randomized-order repeats of the quadruplet {(C=0,Y=0),(C=0,Y=1),(C=1,Y=0),(C=1,Y=1)} x R

R.note: repeats per microblock; R>=2 gives within-(subject,microblock,Y_design) condition support

min_support_strata.note: >= this many (subject,microblock,Y_design) strata with BOTH conditions

table_hash.note: hash of the per-(subject,microblock,Y_design) C composition; ENFORCED: the executed C must adhere to the table (adherence==1.0), else executed_deviates_from_registered_table

enforcement.hash_integrity: recomputed table hash must match the pin
enforcement.provenance_attestation: manifest.generated_before_recording AND manifest.Y_design_pre_assignment must be True (ENFORCED boolean FLOOR; data-level provenance is inherently unverifiable from (C,Y_design,Z) and is guaranteed by the B9.1 acquisition protocol)
enforcement.adherence: executed FULL tuple (C, Y_design, subject, microblock) == registered table row-for-row (adherence==1.0, equal length) -- binds BOTH randomized factors, anti-p-hacking on C AND Y_design (the null holds Y_design fixed). Row-order: positional alignment (B9.1 joins on a per-trial id)
enforcement.executed_properties: C x Y_design balance (both-condition strata) + no prior shift P(Y_design|C) + randomization support
enforcement.note: B9 without adherence + provenance-attestation binding would be DECORATIVE -- it is the single property distinguishing B9 from the B8 line

exact_null: resample C* only within the predeclared randomization set = uniform permutation of C within each (subject, microblock, Y_design) stratum (preserves C x Y_design balance; Y_design pre-assignment => collider-free CONDITIONAL on genuine within-stratum randomization of executed trials -- Z-dependent balance-preserving attrition is out of reach of the Z-blind validator, excluded by the B9.1 protocol); recompute the same contrast T(Y_design, Z, C*).
alert_conjunction: estimable (n_exact_invalid <= 0.20*n_boot) AND p_meanT <= 0.025 AND p_stud <= 0.025 AND n_eligible >= 20 (B9.0 drops the B3 subject-consistency LCB>0 gate; reconsider before B9.1 confirmatory use)
